visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long chestnut-brown hair and a white off-shoulder lace blouse is seated in an indoor bedroom setting. Behind her is a white bed with a quilted headboard and a cream-colored wall. She actively unboxes a large gray cardboard container, peeling back a clear plastic covering to reveal rows of small, round, and smooth white rice cakes. The lighting is bright and diffused, creating a clean and soft atmosphere. (2) She picks up a single white rice cake with her right hand, which features light blue nail polish. She brings the object close to the camera lens, highlighting its uniform color and slightly sticky surface texture. A black lavalier microphone is clipped to her collar. The camera remains in a steady medium close-up, focusing on her expressions and the product. (3) The woman takes a large bite of the rice cake, chewing slowly and showing a satisfied facial expression with a slight smile. She pulls the remaining piece apart with her fingers to display the porous, sponge-like internal texture, which appears soft and moist. A yellow and white variety-style caption appears at the top of the frame throughout this phase. (4) She continues to eat and then reaches for a small, curved yellow and green plastic bottle of banana milk. She removes the cap and takes a deliberate sip while looking directly into the lens. She alternates between chewing the rice cake and drinking the milk, eventually giving a thumbs-up gesture with her right hand toward the camera as she finishes.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: POV 韓國有夏天不會壞掉的年糕？. [Variety]: 比熊年糕？！. (2) [Variety]: （好多比熊們）. (3) [Subtitle]: 沒有啦😂. (4) [Subtitle]: 因為長得像比熊犬太可愛 我自己命名😂. (5) [Subtitle]: 是韓國的一種米糕 기장떡 (술떡). (6) [Subtitle]: 不是像麻糬那種口感. (7) [Subtitle]: 而是紮實中帶著鬆軟 綿綿厚實的感覺😍. (8) [Subtitle]: 這是在大夏天也不容易壞掉的年糕. (9) [Subtitle]: 用米酒發酵製成的. (10) [Subtitle]: 真的很特別吧？. (11) [Subtitle]: 小時候過節回奶奶家時都會吃這個. (12) [Subtitle]: 好久沒吃到，味道還是一樣超好吃. (13) [Subtitle]: 超級搭配欸... 💛. (14) [Subtitle]: 大家覺得這樣一盒多少錢呢？. (15) [Subtitle]: 一箱裡面有50顆. (16) [Subtitle]: 剩下的準備跟家人一起分享. (17) [Subtitle]: 這種又Q又鬆軟的年糕口感. (18) [Subtitle]: 大家一定要試試看啊!!!!. (19) [Subtitle]: 我在台灣到現在都還沒找到類似的呢.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator speaking to the camera.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long brown hair, wearing a white lace off-shoulder top and light blue nail polish.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A domestic indoor setting featuring a white bed with a textured headboard and a simple cream-colored wall.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A friendly female voice begins speaking in Chinese with a mid-range pitch and expressive, rising intonations. The background is filled with a light, upbeat acoustic pop track featuring a strummed guitar and a soft percussive beat. Loud, high-frequency plastic rustling and crinkling noises are prominently heard as a container is opened. (2) The vocal narration continues at a steady pace while crisp, wet chewing and smacking sounds become the central focus, indicating the consumption of a soft, moist food item. The BGM remains steady in the background, providing a cheerful bed for the eating ASMR-like sounds. (3) The speaker's voice rises in pitch and excitement as she describes the texture. Soft tearing sounds of the food item being pulled apart are audible, followed by repeated chewing sounds. The acoustic guitar rhythm continues without interruption, maintaining a consistent tempo and major key feel. (4) A sharp mechanical click sound is followed by the distinct sound of liquid being sipped and swallowed from a bottle. The female voice concludes with an enthusiastic summary, while the chewing sounds continue softly under the speech. The track ends as the music and vocal fade together with no technical distortion.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Product Demo -> Taste Test -> Personal Reflection -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To review and introduce a specific type of traditional Korean rice cake (Gijang-tteok) that is fermented with rice wine and suitable for summer, highlighting its unique texture and taste.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a classic 'mukbang' and review style, combining crisp eating sounds (ASMR) with informative text overlays to engage viewers interested in Korean food culture.
